recommended_schedule.name: Daily Command Brief
recommended_schedule.owner_value: One cockpit for email, ops, cron failures, stale market theses, and the first ugly action.
recommended_schedule.safety_gate: Read-only summary; external actions remain draft-only.

recommended_schedule.name: Afternoon Ops Mini-Scan
recommended_schedule.owner_value: Catches urgent Toiletland issues before end of day.
recommended_schedule.safety_gate: Silent unless approval-worthy; no customer email sent.

recommended_schedule.name: End-of-Day Approval Catch
recommended_schedule.owner_value: Prevents unresolved customer/vendor approvals from rolling silently into tomorrow.
recommended_schedule.safety_gate: Owner chooses approve, defer, or dismiss.

recommended_schedule.name: Market Thesis Prune
recommended_schedule.owner_value: Stops zombie ticker crons by expiring old AFRM/RDW/TSLA/DRAM-style theses.

tuning_recommendations.recommendation: Replace ticker-specific cron sprawl with an active thesis registry plus generic market-open, intraday, close, and weekly-prune jobs.
tuning_recommendations.demo_visual: Stale thesis counter drops after owner-approved pruning.

tuning_recommendations.recommendation: Merge the morning email triage, abandoned-cart summary, cron-health check, and ugly-action nudge into the Daily Command Brief.
tuning_recommendations.demo_visual: One morning command card with approval-required rows.

tuning_recommendations.recommendation: Keep script-only watchdogs silent when healthy; reduce stable checks from 10-15 minute frequency to 30-60 minutes.
tuning_recommendations.demo_visual: Quiet watchdog strip with last-good-run timestamps.

audit_events.event: Reviewed scheduled operations and produced owner-approved tuning proposal.
Flagged stale ticker thesis risk and recommended registry-based expiry.
